params.TriggerDescription: Whenever chaos ensues, you may cast a foretold card you own from exile without paying its mana cost this turn.

params.Description: Each nonland card in your hand without foretell has foretell. Its foretell cost is equal to its mana cost reduced by {2}. (During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile it from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)
